system.description: When you would like to make a special place a little more special, stand outside it and roll [quality]..

outcomes.success:
this place becomes a Vale, and gains one of the following traits:
  • Shrouded: this place is now impossible to find on purpose by any mundane means. Unless you tell them how, only people who have familiarity with Anomalous Resonance can find this place.
  • Unmoored: every mission, this place will move to a different plausible location. You may decide to place it at any time, and it will have been there all day.
  • Brigadooned: This place will disappear until a future time you set (up to 100 years away) when you use this ability, at which point it returns seamlessly.
  • Lost: this place can only be found by people, including you, who are not looking for it.
outcomes.sixplus3s: in addition to the place gaining one of the above traits, you may return to this place at any time by passing through any doorway and closing it behind you.
outcomes.failure: the place becomes a Vale for something or someone else. You cannot use any Anomaly Abilities here again.
